LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Desc: Consumes one reactor saint sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and calls down a sealed reactor cocoon near the colony. The cocoon crashes in with a violent breach impact, remains dormant for a prolonged cycle, then releases the Infernal Reactor Saint before burning upward into the sky.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Rewards: • Second full boss tier after the first vertical slice • Drops a saint reactor core, spacer-grade salvage, and high-value residue • Forces anti-artillery spacing and sustained boss pressure management
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_SideEffect: • Arrives as a real falling cocoon instead of an instant pop-in • Impacts near the colony with a breach explosion before opening • Stays on the field after release, then burns back into the sky
LanguageData.ABY_ReactorSaintSummonSuccessDesc: The sealed cocoon has broken open. The Infernal Reactor Saint has stepped out of the breach and is now fully active.
